cache_hits_total / cache_misses_total

div.div:
Recording Rules
(5m 集計)
service:http_requests:rate5m
service:http_errors:rate5m
service:http_request_duration_seconds:p99
service:http_request_duration_seconds:p95
service:grpc_requests:rate5m
service:grpc_errors:rate5m
slo:availability:ratio
slo:error_budget:remaining

div.div:
JSON ログフォーマット:
{
timestamp: ISO 8601 (UTC)
level: debug|info|warn|error
service: サービス名
tier: system|business|service
trace_id: トレースID
span_id: スパンID
request_id: リクエストID
method: HTTP メソッド
path: リクエストパス
status: ステータスコード
duration_ms: 処理時間
}

div.div:
OTel Collector
Receivers:
OTLP gRPC (4317)
OTLP HTTP (4318)
Processors:
batch (5s / 512件)
tail_sampling:
ERROR → 100% 保持
normal → 10% サンプリング
observability NS にデプロイ

dev: AlwaysOn (100%)

div.div:
Prometheus
(アラート評価)
recording_rules.yaml
alerting_rules.yaml
15s 評価間隔

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(253, 240, 240), rgb(37, 26, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 228px; height: 1px; padding-top: 267px; margin-left: 1203px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #8B2020;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#8B2020, #ffabab); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
アラートルール:
SystemServiceErrorRateWarning
→ system 5xx > 0.1% (5m) [warning]
SystemServiceHighErrorRate
→ system 5xx > 1% (5m) [critical]
SystemServiceHighLatency
→ system P99 > 500ms (5m) [warning]
ServiceErrorRateWarning
→ biz/svc 5xx > 0.2% (5m) [warning]
ServiceHighErrorRate
→ biz/svc 5xx > 5% (5m) [critical]
ServiceHighLatency
→ biz/svc P99 > 1s (5m) [warning]
SLOBurnRateCritical
→ 14.4x (1h+5m窓) [critical]
SLOBurnRateWarning
→ 6x (6h+30m窓) [warning]

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 127px; margin-left: 1512px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Alertmanager
ルーティング:
group_by: [alertname, namespace, service]
group_wait: 30s
group_interval: 5m
severity ベースルーティング:
critical → teams-critical (1h repeat)
warning → teams-warning (4h repeat)
環境別抑制:
dev: 全無効
staging: warning 無効
prod: 全有効

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(253, 240, 240), rgb(37, 26, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 372px; margin-left: 1513px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #8B2020;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#8B2020, #ffabab); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Tier 別閾値:
system (厳格):
warning: error > 0.1% / P99 > 500ms
critical: error > 1%
business/service (寛容):
warning: error > 0.2% / P99 > 1s
critical: error > 5%

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

prometheus-msteams
(2000)
Webhook プロキシ
connectors:
/default
/critical
/warning
Webhook URL は
K8s Secret で管理

send_resolved: true

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 122px; margin-left: 2413px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #8B2020;

div.div:
アラート種別:
高エラーレート (5xx)
高レイテンシ (P99)
Pod クラッシュ (ServiceDown)
DLQ 蓄積
証明書期限切れ
SLO バーンレート超過
Silence/Inhibit ルール:
critical 発火時 warning 抑制

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(253, 240, 240), rgb(37, 26, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 322px; margin-left: 2413px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #8B2020;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#8B2020, #ffabab); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Inhibit ルール:
同一 service で critical が
発火中の場合、warning を抑制
source: severity=critical
target: severity=warning
equal: [alertname, namespace, service]

div.div:
技術スタック選定理由:
Prometheus: K8s統合 + PromQL + Recording Rules
Loki: ラベルベース低コスト (vs OpenSearch)
Jaeger + OTel: CNCF 標準、ベンダーロックイン回避
Grafana: 3データソース統合表示
